extraction_examples.input: Dr. Sharma, Reg: KA/45678/2015, Date: 01/11/2024, Patient: Rajesh Kumar, Diagnosis: Viral fever, Rx: Paracetamol 650mg 1-0-1 x 5 days, Vitamin C 500mg 1-0-0 x 10 days. Consultation Fee: Rs 1000, Tests: CBC Rs 300, Dengue test Rs 200. Total: Rs 1500
Apollo Dental Clinic. Dr. Patel MH/23456/2018. Patient: Priya Singh. Diagnosis: Tooth decay. Procedures: Root canal Rs 8000, Teeth whitening Rs 4000. Total: Rs 12000

adjudication_examples.reasoning: Standard consultation for viral fever. All documents valid. Amount within limits. Treatment medically necessary.
Root canal covered (₹8000). Teeth whitening excluded as cosmetic procedure (₹4000 rejected).
Weight loss treatments are explicitly excluded from policy coverage.
